title: Basic Loot Bags
description: Adds simple loot bag rewards that rarely drop from hostile mobs!
body:
># Basic Loot Bags
> A mod about adding suprise loot bag drops to hostile enemies!
![A creeper, spider and witch dropping loot bag items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b33cbb4d00c46d59c3b01e12ec234f035d4d8c_0.webp)

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

(If you find a bug, make a bug report on the [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/basic-loot-bags) or the discord server)

</center>

>## CONTENT

### || Features tiered loot bags that drop from most hostile mobs (left to right):
- Common: 1.5% chance
- Uncommon: 0.9% chance
- Rare: 0.5% chance
- Epic: 0.2% chance
- Legendary: 0.06% chance
![All 5 tiered loot bags in a dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15ba6920d5c70529de10005cdab19a5c8ac9092f.png)
(Weak mobs, bosses, or mobs from spawners, will not drop loot bags)
### || Also includes some special mob loot bags, such as the Witch's Satchel and Spider Meal!
![A witch satchel and spider meal inside a witch hut, near a witch and cave spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5a675fe61c30d90e5f740fec4658ababddff1a.png)

### || Displays a message to you in chat showing recieved items
(Can be disabled in config)

![An uncommon loot bag being opened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6001ddc32a9a3846ef16932c9dc76b347765458a.gif)

### || Q&A:

> Q: Can you port to [x] version/modloader?

A: Probably not soon.

> Q: Can i include this in my modpack?

A: If it's on CurseForge or Modrinth, sure!

> Q: Can i add my own loot bags?

A: Currently not yet, but you can modify the loot tables of the loot bags with a datapack!

### || CREDITS:

> Some sound effects are heavily modified/mixed sounds sourced from Minecraft and Minecraft Dungeons. The original rights belong to the respective creators. These modified sounds are unique to this mod and cannot be reused elsewhere without permission.

> Witch's Satchel texture inspired by [Satchels](https://modrinth.com/mod/satchel)
